name: Shaun Tan's Tales from Outer Suburbia
original_name: Shaun Tan's Tales from Outer Suburbia
overview: Two siblings discover a strange world beneath a deceptively ordinary surface: a wise local buffalo; an inch-tall exchange student; a hidden room that leads to other countries; a lost deep sea diver and many other mysteries, all raising questions about what it means to be a family.
